title: Manufacturing Engineer - Samsung India Electronics Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Samsung India Electronics Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics Capital India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics Capital India:
Samsung India Electronics Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics Capital India!
